title: tragia discolor var. subovalis
intro: Tragia discolor var. subovalis, also known as the spotted spurge, is a plant species belonging to the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) and is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Tragia discolor var. subovalis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat fever and other systemic infections. Tragia discolor var. subovalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or ointment to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
